  { unit:7,  q:"I _____ my key. I can't get in.",           opts:["lose","lost","have lost","had lost"],            ans:2, exp:"Present result → present perfect." },

  { unit:9,  q:"I _____ English for six months.",           opts:["learn","have learned","have been learning","am learning"], ans:2, exp:"Ongoing activity with duration → present perfect continuous." },

  { unit:12, q:"I've lived here _____ 2015.",               opts:["for","since","during","from"],                   ans:1, exp:"Since + point in time." },

  { unit:15, q:"When I arrived, the film _____ already _____.", opts:["has/started","had/started","was/starting","started/already"], ans:1, exp:"Earlier past action → past perfect." },

  { unit:18, q:"I _____ smoke, but I stopped two years ago.", opts:["use to","am used to","used to","was used to"], ans:2, exp:"Past habit → used to." },

  { unit:20, q:"Look at those clouds — it _____ rain!",     opts:["will","is going to","is","would"],               ans:1, exp:"Prediction with evidence → going to." },

  { unit:21, q:"A: We have no milk. B: OK, I _____ get some.", opts:["am going to","will","would","shall"],         ans:1, exp:"Spontaneous decision → will." },

  { unit:25, q:"When you _____, give me a call.",           opts:["will arrive","arrive","arrived","are arriving"], ans:1, exp:"Future time clause → present simple." },

  { unit:26, q:"In the future, we _____ travel to Mars.",   opts:["can","could","will be able to","are able to"],   ans:2, exp:"Future ability → will be able to." },

  { unit:28, q:"You've been travelling all day. You _____ tired.", opts:["can be","must be","should be","would be"], ans:1, exp:"Logical deduction → must." },

  { unit:29, q:"I _____ go to Paris. I'm not sure yet.",    opts:["will","must","may","should"],                    ans:2, exp:"Possibility → may/might." },

  { unit:31, q:"You _____ wear a tie. Not necessary.",      opts:["mustn't","don't have to","shouldn't","can't"],   ans:1, exp:"Don't have to = not necessary." },

  { unit:33, q:"I _____ studied more. (past regret)",       opts:["should have","must have","could","had to"],      ans:0, exp:"Past regret → should have + past participle." },

  { unit:35, q:"You _____ take an umbrella — looks like rain.", opts:["should","had better","must","have to"],      ans:1, exp:"Had better = strong advice for specific situation." },

  { unit:38, q:"If it _____, we'll cancel the match.",      opts:["will rain","rains","rained","would rain"],       ans:1, exp:"Type 1 conditional: if + present simple." },

  { unit:39, q:"I wish I _____ the answer. (I don't know)", opts:["know","knew","have known","will know"],          ans:1, exp:"Wish + past simple for present unreal wishes." },

  { unit:40, q:"If I had known, I _____ visited you.",      opts:["will have","would have","had","could"],          ans:1, exp:"Type 3 conditional: would have + past participle." },

  { unit:42, q:"My car _____ last night.",                  opts:["stole","was stolen","has stolen","is stolen"],   ans:1, exp:"Past passive: was + past participle." },

  { unit:46, q:"I _____ my hair cut yesterday.",            opts:["had","have","got","did"],                        ans:0, exp:"Causative have: had + object + past participle." },

  { unit:47, q:"'I am tired.' → She said she _____ tired.", opts:["is","was","has been","were"],                    ans:1, exp:"Present → past in reported speech." },

  { unit:48, q:"'Where do you live?' → She asked where I _____.", opts:["live","lived","do live","did live"],       ans:1, exp:"Reported question: normal word order + tense shift." },

  { unit:49, q:"What _____ this word mean?",                opts:["means","is","does","do"],                       ans:2, exp:"Question with 'does' for third person." },

  { unit:50, q:"Do you know _____ the bank is?",            opts:["where is","where","where does","where can"],     ans:1, exp:"Indirect question: normal word order." },

  { unit:52, q:"It's cold today, _____ it?",                opts:["isn't","is","wasn't","was"],                    ans:0, exp:"Positive sentence → negative tag." },

  { unit:53, q:"Have you finished _____ the dishes?",       opts:["to do","do","doing","done"],                    ans:2, exp:"Finish + -ing form." },

  { unit:55, q:"Remember _____ her tonight! (don't forget)", opts:["calling","call","to call","called"],            ans:2, exp:"Remember + to-infinitive = don't forget to do it." },

  { unit:58, q:"She left without _____ goodbye.",           opts:["to say","say","says","saying"],                  ans:3, exp:"After preposition 'without' → -ing form." },

  { unit:61, q:"Do you have _____ information?",            opts:["an","a","any","some"],                          ans:2, exp:"Uncountable noun in question → any." },

  { unit:63, q:"I saw _____ dog. _____ dog was barking.",   opts:["a/A","a/The","the/The","the/A"],                ans:1, exp:"First mention 'a', second mention 'the'." },

  { unit:67, q:"_____ dogs are loyal animals.",             opts:["The","A","—","Some"],                           ans:2, exp:"General statement → no article." },

  { unit:71, q:"There isn't _____ time.",                   opts:["many","a few","much","a lot"],                  ans:2, exp:"Much + uncountable." },

  { unit:85, q:"The lesson was _____. I was _____.",        opts:["interesting/interested","interested/interesting","bored/boring","boring/bored"], ans:0, exp:"-ing for cause; -ed for the person who feels it." },

  { unit:87, q:"She speaks English very _____.",            opts:["good","well","goodly","nice"],                   ans:1, exp:"Adverb needed to modify verb: well." },

  { unit:89, q:"It was _____ a cold day that we stayed in.", opts:["so","such","very","too"],                       ans:1, exp:"Such a + noun phrase." },

  { unit:90, q:"This coffee is _____ hot to drink.",        opts:["so","such","too","very"],                       ans:2, exp:"Too = more than desired." },

  { unit:96, q:"_____ it was raining, we went out.",        opts:["Despite","In spite of","Although","Because"],   ans:2, exp:"Although + clause." },

  { unit:97, q:"Take an umbrella _____ it rains.",          opts:["if","although","in case","unless"],             ans:2, exp:"In case = precaution." },

  { unit:101, q:"The meeting is _____ Monday.",             opts:["at","in","on","by"],                            ans:2, exp:"On + days." },

  { unit:104, q:"Can you finish it _____ Monday?",          opts:["until","by","in","on"],                         ans:1, exp:"By = deadline." },

  { unit:118, q:"I fell asleep _____ the film.",            opts:["while","for","during","since"],                 ans:2, exp:"During + noun." },

  { unit:119, q:"I'll be ready _____ 6. (deadline)",        opts:["until","by","since","for"],                     ans:1, exp:"By = no later than." },

  { unit:121, q:"I haven't finished _____.",                opts:["already","still","yet","even"],                 ans:2, exp:"Yet at end of negatives." },

  { unit:140, q:"She _____ me that she was leaving.",       opts:["said","told","spoke","talked"],                  ans:1, exp:"Tell + object." },

  { unit:92,  q:"This car is _____ than that one.",         opts:["more cheap","cheaper","most cheap","cheapest"], ans:1, exp:"Short adjective → -er comparative." },

  { unit:95,  q:"This is _____ longest river in the world.", opts:["a","—","the","an"],                            ans:2, exp:"Always 'the' before superlatives." },

];

</script>

<script>

// ============================================================

// STATE

// ============================================================

let state = {

  currentView: 'home',

  currentUnit: null,

  theme: 'light',

  progress: {},      // { unitId: { viewed, completed, score, attempts } }

  bookmarks: [],

  recentlyViewed: [],

  examAnswers: {},

  examQuestions: [],

  examType: null,

  examStartTime: null,

  examTimerInterval: null,

  activeFilter: 'all',

  exerciseStates: {},

};

// ============================================================

// PERSISTENCE

// ============================================================

function saveState() {

  try {

    localStorage.setItem('eiuProgress',  JSON.stringify(state.progress));

    localStorage.setItem('eiuBookmarks', JSON.stringify(state.bookmarks));

    localStorage.setItem('eiuRecent',    JSON.stringify(state.recentlyViewed));

    localStorage.setItem('eiuTheme',     state.theme);

    const today = new Date().toDateString();

    const last = localStorage.getItem('eiuLastStudy');

    let streak = parseInt(localStorage.getItem('eiuStreak') || '0');

    const yesterday = new Date(Date.now()-86400000).toDateString();

    if (last === yesterday) streak++;

    else if (last !== today) streak = 1;

    localStorage.setItem('eiuLastStudy', today);

    localStorage.setItem('eiuStreak', streak);

  } catch(e) {}

}

function loadState() {

  try {

    state.progress        = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('eiuProgress')  || '{}');

    state.bookmarks       = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('eiuBookmarks') || '[]');

    state.recentlyViewed  = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('eiuRecent')    || '[]');

    state.theme           = localStorage.getItem('eiuTheme') || 'light';

  } catch(e) {

    state.progress = {}; state.bookmarks = []; state.recentlyViewed = [];

  }

}

// ============================================================

// THEME

// ============================================================

function toggleTheme() {

  state.theme = state.theme === 'light' ? 'dark' : 'light';

  applyTheme();

  saveState();

}

function applyTheme() {

  document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', state.theme);

  document.getElementById('theme-btn').textContent = state.theme === 'dark' ? '☀️' : '🌙';

}

// ============================================================

// SIDEBAR

// ============================================================

let sidebarOpen = false;

function toggleSidebar() {

  sidebarOpen = !sidebarOpen;

  document.getElementById('sidebar').classList.toggle('open', sidebarOpen);

}

function closeSidebarOnMobile() {

  if (window.innerWidth <= 900 && sidebarOpen) toggleSidebar();

}

function buildSidebar() {

  const inner = document.getElementById('sidebar-inner');

  let html = '';

  CATEGORIES.forEach(cat => {

    const catUnits = UNITS.filter(u => u.cat === cat.id);

    html += `

    <div class="sb-section">

      <div class="sb-section-hdr" onclick="toggleSbSection(this)">

        ${cat.label}

        <span class="toggle-btn">▼</span>

      </div>

      <div class="sb-unit-list">`;

    catUnits.forEach(u => {

      const done = state.progress[u.id]?.completed;

      html += `

        <div class="sb-unit ${done ? 'completed' : ''}" id="sb-unit-${u.id}"

          onclick="openUnit(${u.id})">

          <span class="sb-num">${u.id}</span>

          <span style="flex:1">${u.title}</span>

          <span class="sb-check">✓</span>

        </div>`;

    });

    html += `</div></div>`;

  });

  inner.innerHTML = html;

  updateSidebarProgress();

}

function toggleSbSection(hdr) {

  hdr.classList.toggle('collapsed');

  const list = hdr.nextElementSibling;

  if (hdr.classList.contains('collapsed')) {

    list.style.maxHeight = '0px';

  } else {

    list.style.maxHeight = list.scrollHeight + 'px';

  }

}

function updateSidebarProgress() {

  const total    = UNITS.length;

  const completed = Object.values(state.progress).filter(p => p.completed).length;

  const pct = Math.round((completed / total) * 100);

  const bar = document.getElementById('sb-prog-bar');

  const lbl = document.getElementById('sb-prog-pct');

  if (bar) bar.style.width = pct + '%';

  if (lbl) lbl.textContent = pct + '%';

  // Update checkmarks

  UNITS.forEach(u => {

    const el = document.getElementById(`sb-unit-${u.id}`);

    if (!el) return;

    el.classList.toggle('completed', !!state.progress[u.id]?.completed);

  });

}

// ============================================================

// VIEW MANAGEMENT

// ============================================================

const VIEWS = ['home','unit','exam','bookmarks','recent','stats'];

function showView(name) {

  VIEWS.forEach(v => {

    const el = document.getElementById(`view-${v}`);

    if (el) el.style.display = 'none';

  });

  const target = document.getElementById(`view-${name}`);

  if (target) target.style.display = '';

  state.currentView = name;

  // Activate sidebar unit

  document.querySelectorAll('.sb-unit').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('active'));

  if (name === 'unit' && state.currentUnit) {

    const sb = document.getElementById(`sb-unit-${state.currentUnit}`);

    if (sb) { sb.classList.add('active'); sb.scrollIntoView({block:'nearest'}); }

  }

  if (name === 'home')      renderHome();

  if (name === 'bookmarks') renderBookmarks();

  if (name === 'recent')    renderRecent();

  if (name === 'stats')     renderStats();

  closeSidebarOnMobile();

  window.scrollTo(0, 0);

  updateReadingProgress();

}

// ============================================================

// HOME VIEW

// ============================================================

function renderHome() {

  // Stats

  const total     = UNITS.length;

  const studied   = Object.keys(state.progress).length;

  const completed = Object.values(state.progress).filter(p => p.completed).length;

  const scores    = Object.values(state.progress).filter(p => p.score != null).map(p => p.score);

  const avgAcc    = scores.length ? Math.round(scores.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0)/scores.length) : null;

  const streak    = parseInt(localStorage.getItem('eiuStreak') || '0');

  document.getElementById('stat-studied').textContent   = studied;

  document.getElementById('stat-completed').textContent = completed;

  document.getElementById('stat-accuracy').textContent  = avgAcc != null ? avgAcc + '%' : '—';

  document.getElementById('stat-streak').textContent    = streak;

  document.getElementById('stat-studied-bar').style.width = Math.round((studied/total)*100) + '%';

  // Filter tabs

  const tabs = document.getElementById('home-filter-tabs');

  tabs.innerHTML = `<button class="filter-tab ${state.activeFilter==='all'?'active':''}" onclick="filterUnits('all')">All</button>`;

  CATEGORIES.forEach(c => {

    tabs.innerHTML += `<button class="filter-tab ${state.activeFilter===c.id?'active':''}" onclick="filterUnits('${c.id}')">${c.label}</button>`;

  });

  renderUnitGrid();

  updateBookmarkCount();

}

function filterUnits(catId) {

  state.activeFilter = catId;

  renderHome();

}

function renderUnitGrid() {

  const grid  = document.getElementById('home-unit-grid');

  const label = document.getElementById('home-grid-label');

  const filtered = state.activeFilter === 'all'

    ? UNITS

    : UNITS.filter(u => u.cat === state.activeFilter);

  label.textContent = state.activeFilter === 'all'

    ? `All ${UNITS.length} Units`

    : `${filtered.length} units — ${CATEGORIES.find(c=>c.id===state.activeFilter)?.label}`;

  grid.innerHTML = filtered.map(u => unitCard(u)).join('');

}

function unitCard(u) {

  const done = state.progress[u.id]?.completed;

  const score = state.progress[u.id]?.score;

  const color = CAT_COLOR[u.cat] || 'tense';

  return `

  <div class="unit-card ${done?'completed':''}" onclick="openUnit(${u.id})">

    <div class="uc-num">Unit ${u.id}</div>

    <div class="uc-title">${u.title}</div>

    <div class="uc-cat">${CATEGORIES.find(c=>c.id===u.cat)?.label||''}</div>

    <div class="uc-tags">

      <span class="tag tag-${color}">${CATEGORIES.find(c=>c.id===u.cat)?.label||''}</span>

      ${score!=null ? `<span class="tag tag-${score>=80?'clause':score>=50?'adv':'preposition'}">${score}%</span>` : ''}

    </div>

  </div>`;

}

function continueStudying() {

  const notDone = UNITS.find(u => !state.progress[u.id]?.viewed);

  if (notDone) openUnit(notDone.id);

  else openUnit(1);

}

// ============================================================

// UNIT VIEW

// ============================================================

function openUnit(unitId) {

  const unit = UNITS.find(u => u.id === unitId);

  if (!unit) return;

  state.currentUnit = unitId;

  if (!state.progress[unitId]) state.progress[unitId] = {};

  state.progress[unitId].viewed = true;

  // Recently viewed

  state.recentlyViewed = [unitId, ...state.recentlyViewed.filter(id=>id!==unitId)].slice(0,20);

  saveState();

  updateSidebarProgress();

  renderUnit(unit);

  showView('unit');

}

function renderUnit(unit) {

  const lessonEl   = document.getElementById('lesson-panel');

  const exerciseEl = document.getElementById('exercise-panel');

  const isBookmarked = state.bookmarks.includes(unit.id);

  const catLabel = CATEGORIES.find(c=>c.id===unit.cat)?.label||'';

  // Lesson panel

  lessonEl.innerHTML = `

    <div class="unit-hdr">

      <div class="uh-top">

        <div>

          <span class="uh-num">Unit ${unit.id}</span>

        </div>

        <div class="uh-actions">

          <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="bookmark-btn" onclick="toggleBookmark(${unit.id})" title="Bookmark (B)">

            ${isBookmarked ? '🔖' : '🤍'} ${isBookmarked ? 'Saved' : 'Save'}

          </button>

          <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" onclick="printUnit()" title="Print (P)">🖨️</button>

          <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" onclick="markComplete(${unit.id})" title="Mark complete">

            ${state.progress[unit.id]?.completed ? '✅ Done' : '⬜ Mark done'}

          </button>

        </div>

      </div>

      <h2>${unit.title}</h2>

      <div class="uh-meta">

        <span class="tag tag-${CAT_COLOR[unit.cat]||'tense'}">${catLabel}</span>

        ${unit.subtitle ? `<span style="font-size:.8rem;color:var(--c-text3)">${unit.subtitle}</span>` : ''}

      </div>

    </div>

    ${renderLessonContent(unit)}

    ${renderUnitNav(unit.id)}

  `;

  // Exercise panel

  const exs = EXERCISES[unit.id];

  if (exs && exs.length > 0) {

    exerciseEl.innerHTML = renderExercises(unit.id, exs);

  } else {

    exerciseEl.innerHTML = `

      <div class="ex-panel-title">Practice Exercises</div>

      <div style="color:var(--c-text3);font-size:.875rem;padding:20px 0;text-align:center;">

        <div style="font-size:2rem;margin-bottom:8px">📝</div>

        <p>Review the lesson and apply the rules.</p>

        <button class="btn btn-outline btn-sm" style="margin-top:12px" onclick="openQuickQuiz(${unit.id})">

          Take a Quick Quiz

        </button>

      </div>`;

  }

  // Scroll to top of panels

  lessonEl.scrollTop = 0;

  exerciseEl.scrollTop = 0;

}

function renderLessonContent(unit) {

  let html = '';

  // Formula

  if (unit.formula) {

    html += `

    <div class="lesson-section">

      <div class="ls-title t-rule">Formula / Structure</div>

      <div class="formula-box">${unit.formula.replace(/\n/g,'<br>')}</div>

    </div>`;

  }

  // Rules

  if (unit.rules && unit.rules.length) {

    html += `

    <div class="lesson-section">

      <div class="ls-title t-rule">Key Rules</div>

      <div class="rule-list">

        ${unit.rules.map(r=>`<div class="rule-item">${r}</div>`).join('')}

      </div>

    </div>`;

  }

  // Examples

  if (unit.examples && unit.examples.length) {

    html += `

    <div class="lesson-section">

      <div class="ls-title t-example">Examples</div>

      <div class="example-list">

        ${unit.examples.map(e=>`

          <div class="ex-item">

            <span class="ex-marker">▸</span>

            <span class="ex-text">${e.text}${e.note?`<span class="ex-note">${e.note}</span>`:''}</span>

          </div>`).join('')}

      </div>

    </div>`;

  }

  // Notes

  if (unit.notes && unit.notes.length) {

    html += `<div class="lesson-section">

      <div class="ls-title t-note">Important Notes</div>

      ${unit.notes.map(n=>`

        <div class="note-box">

          <span class="nb-icon">💡</span>

          <div>${n}</div>

        </div>`).join('')}

    </div>`;

  }

  // Common mistakes

  if (unit.mistakes && unit.mistakes.length) {

    html += `<div class="lesson-section">

      <div class="ls-title t-mistake">Common Mistakes</div>

      <div class="mistake-box">

        ${unit.mistakes.map(m=>`

          <div class="mistake-row">

            <span class="mr-x">✗</span>

            <span class="mr-text mr-wrong">${m.wrong}</span>

          </div>

          <div class="mistake-row">

            <span class="mr-check">✓</span>

            <span class="mr-text">${m.right}</span>

          </div>`).join('<hr style="border:none;border-top:1px solid var(--c-border);margin:6px 0">')}

      </div>

    </div>`;

  }

  // Comparison table

  if (unit.compare && unit.compare.length) {

    const headers = unit.compare[0];

    const rows    = unit.compare.slice(1);

    const cols    = Object.values(headers);

    html += `<div class="lesson-section">

      <div class="ls-title t-compare">Comparison</div>

      <table class="compare-table">

        <thead><tr>${cols.map(h=>`<th>${h}</th>`).join('')}</tr></thead>

        <tbody>

          ${rows.map(r=>`<tr>${Object.values(r).map(c=>`<td>${c}</td>`).join('')}</tr>`).join('')}

        </tbody>

      </table>

    </div>`;

  }

  // Quick summary

  html += `<div class="lesson-section">

    <div class="ls-title t-summary">Quick Revision</div>

    <div class="collapsible">

      <div class="coll-header" onclick="toggleColl(this)">

        <span>📋 Summary for ${unit.title}</span>

        <span class="coll-arrow">▶</span>

      </div>

      <div class="coll-body">

        ${unit.rules ? unit.rules.map(r=>`<div style="padding:4px 0;font-size:.875rem;border-bottom:1px solid var(--c-border);">• ${r}</div>`).join('') : '<p>Review the rules above.</p>'}

      </div>

    </div>

  </div>`;

  return html;

}

function renderUnitNav(unitId) {

  const idx  = UNITS.findIndex(u => u.id === unitId);

  const prev = UNITS[idx - 1];

  const next = UNITS[idx + 1];

  return `

  <div class="unit-nav-strip">

    <button class="unav-btn" ${!prev?'disabled':''} onclick="${prev?`openUnit(${prev.id})`:''}">

      ← ${prev ? 'Unit ' + prev.id : 'First unit'}

    </button>

    <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" onclick="showView('home')">⊞ All Units</button>

    <button class="unav-btn" ${!next?'disabled':''} onclick="${next?`openUnit(${next.id})`:''}">

      ${next ? 'Unit ' + next.id : 'Last unit'} →

    </button>

  </div>`;

}

// ============================================================

// EXERCISES

// ============================================================

function renderExercises(unitId, exs) {

  const prog = state.progress[unitId] || {};

  let html = `

    <div class="ex-panel-title">

      <span>Practice (${exs.length} questions)</span>

      <span class="ep-score" id="ex-score-${unitId}">Score: —</span>

    </div>`;

  exs.forEach((ex, i) => {

    html += `<div class="quiz-card" id="qc-${unitId}-${i}">

      <div class="qc-num">Q${i+1} · ${ex.type === 'mc' ? 'Multiple Choice' : ex.type === 'fill' ? 'Fill in the Blank' : 'Error Correction'}</div>

      <div class="qc-question">${formatQuestion(ex)}</div>`;

    if (ex.type === 'mc') {

      html += `<div class="qc-options">`;

      ex.opts.forEach((opt, j) => {

        html += `<button class="qc-option" id="opt-${unitId}-${i}-${j}" onclick="answerMC(${unitId},${i},${j})">${opt}</button>`;

      });

      html += `</div>`;

    } else {

      html += `<input type="text" class="fill-input" id="fill-${unitId}-${i}"

        placeholder="Type your answer..." onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter')checkFill(${unitId},${i})">

        <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" style="margin-top:8px" onclick="checkFill(${unitId},${i})">Check</button>`;

    }

    html += `<div class="qc-feedback" id="fb-${unitId}-${i}"></div>

    </div>`;

  });

  html += `<div class="ex-actions">

    <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" onclick="checkAllExercises(${unitId})">Submit All</button>

    <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" onclick="resetExercises(${unitId})">Reset</button>

  </div>

  <div id="unit-score-display-${unitId}"></div>`;

  return html;

}

function formatQuestion(ex) {

  if (ex.type === 'fill') {

    return ex.q.replace('____________', '<span class="blank">?</span>');

  }

  return ex.q;

}

function answerMC(unitId, qIdx, optIdx) {

  const ex = EXERCISES[unitId][qIdx];

  if (!ex) return;

  if (!state.exerciseStates[unitId]) state.exerciseStates[unitId] = {};

  if (state.exerciseStates[unitId][qIdx]?.answered) return;

  state.exerciseStates[unitId][qIdx] = { answered: true, correct: optIdx === ex.ans, selected: optIdx };

  const opts = document.querySelectorAll(`[id^="opt-${unitId}-${qIdx}-"]`);

  opts.forEach((btn, j) => {

    btn.disabled = true;

    if (j === ex.ans)      btn.classList.add('correct');

    if (j === optIdx && optIdx !== ex.ans) btn.classList.add('wrong');

  });

  showFeedback(unitId, qIdx, optIdx === ex.ans, ex.exp, ex.opts[ex.ans]);

  updateExScore(unitId);

}

function checkFill(unitId, qIdx) {

  const ex = EXERCISES[unitId][qIdx];

  const inp = document.getElementById(`fill-${unitId}-${qIdx}`);

  if (!ex || !inp) return;

  if (!state.exerciseStates[unitId]) state.exerciseStates[unitId] = {};

  if (state.exerciseStates[unitId][qIdx]?.answered) return;

  const userAns = inp.value.trim().toLowerCase();

  const correct = ex.ans.trim().toLowerCase();

  const isCorrect = userAns === correct ||

    correct.split('/').map(s=>s.trim().toLowerCase()).includes(userAns);

  state.exerciseStates[unitId][qIdx] = { answered: true, correct: isCorrect };

  inp.disabled = true;

  inp.classList.add(isCorrect ? 'correct' : 'wrong');

  showFeedback(unitId, qIdx, isCorrect, ex.exp, ex.ans);

  updateExScore(unitId);

}

function checkAllExercises(unitId) {

  const exs = EXERCISES[unitId];

  if (!exs) return;

  exs.forEach((ex, i) => {

    if (state.exerciseStates[unitId]?.[i]?.answered) return;

    if (ex.type === 'mc') {

      // Show correct answer without selection

      if (!state.exerciseStates[unitId]) state.exerciseStates[unitId] = {};

      state.exerciseStates[unitId][i] = { answered: true, correct: false, selected: -1 };

      const opts = document.querySelectorAll(`[id^="opt-${unitId}-${i}-"]`);

      opts.forEach((btn, j) => {

        btn.disabled = true;

        if (j === ex.ans) btn.classList.add('correct');

      });

      showFeedback(unitId, i, false, ex.exp, ex.opts[ex.ans]);

    } else {

      const inp = document.getElementById(`fill-${unitId}-${i}`);

      if (inp && inp.value.trim()) checkFill(unitId, i);

    }

  });

  updateExScore(unitId);

  saveScoreToProgress(unitId);

}

function showFeedback(unitId, qIdx, isCorrect, explanation, correctAns) {

  const fb = document.getElementById(`fb-${unitId}-${qIdx}`);

  if (!fb) return;

  fb.className = `qc-feedback show ${isCorrect ? 'correct' : 'wrong'}`;

  fb.innerHTML = isCorrect

    ? `✓ Correct! <span class="fb-answer">${explanation || ''}</span>`

    : `✗ Incorrect. Answer: <span class="fb-answer">${correctAns}</span>${explanation ? ' — ' + explanation : ''}`;

}

function updateExScore(unitId) {

  const exs = EXERCISES[unitId];

  if (!exs) return;

  const st = state.exerciseStates[unitId] || {};

  const answered = Object.values(st).filter(v => v.answered).length;

  const correct  = Object.values(st).filter(v => v.correct).length;

  const scoreEl  = document.getElementById(`ex-score-${unitId}`);

  if (scoreEl) scoreEl.textContent = `Score: ${correct}/${answered}`;

}

function saveScoreToProgress(unitId) {

  const exs = EXERCISES[unitId];

  if (!exs) return;

  const st = state.exerciseStates[unitId] || {};

  const answered = Object.values(st).filter(v => v.answered).length;

  const correct  = Object.values(st).filter(v => v.correct).length;

  if (answered === 0) return;

  const score = Math.round((correct / exs.length) * 100);

  if (!state.progress[unitId]) state.progress[unitId] = {};

  state.progress[unitId].score     = score;

  state.progress[unitId].completed = true;

  state.progress[unitId].attempts  = (state.progress[unitId].attempts || 0) + 1;

  saveState();

  updateSidebarProgress();

  // Show score display

  const disp = document.getElementById(`unit-score-display-${unitId}`);

  if (disp) {

    const cls = score >= 80 ? 'good' : score >= 50 ? 'ok' : 'poor';

    const msg = score >= 80 ? '🎉 Excellent!' : score >= 50 ? '👍 Good effort!' : '📚 Keep studying!';

    disp.innerHTML = `

    <div class="score-display">

      <div class="sd-number ${cls}">${score}%</div>

      <div class="sd-label">${msg} ${correct}/${exs.length} correct</div>

      <div class="sd-bar">

        <div class="prog-bar-bg">

          <div class="prog-bar-fill" style="width:${score}%;background:${cls==='good'?'var(--c-success)':cls==='ok'?'var(--c-warn)':'var(--c-error)'}"></div>

        </div>

      </div>

    </div>`;

  }

  showToast(`Unit ${unitId} completed! Score: ${score}%`, score >= 80 ? 'success' : 'info');

}

function resetExercises(unitId) {

  state.exerciseStates[unitId] = {};

  const unit = UNITS.find(u => u.id === unitId);

  if (!unit) return;

  const exs = EXERCISES[unitId];

  if (exs) {

    document.getElementById('exercise-panel').innerHTML = renderExercises(unitId, exs);

  }

}

// ============================================================

// BOOKMARKS

// ============================================================

function toggleBookmark(unitId) {

  if (state.bookmarks.includes(unitId)) {

    state.bookmarks = state.bookmarks.filter(id => id !== unitId);

    showToast('Bookmark removed', 'info');

  } else {

    state.bookmarks.push(unitId);

    showToast('Bookmarked!', 'success');

  }

  saveState();

  updateBookmarkCount();

  // Refresh button if visible

  const btn = document.getElementById('bookmark-btn');

  if (btn) {

    const saved = state.bookmarks.includes(unitId);

    btn.innerHTML = saved ? '🔖 Saved' : '🤍 Save';

  }

}

function updateBookmarkCount() {

  const cnt = document.getElementById('bookmark-count');

  if (!cnt) return;

  if (state.bookmarks.length > 0) {

    cnt.style.display = 'flex';

    cnt.textContent   = state.bookmarks.length;

  } else {

    cnt.style.display = 'none';

  }

}

function renderBookmarks() {

  const grid  = document.getElementById('bookmarks-grid');

  const empty = document.getElementById('bookmarks-empty');

  if (state.bookmarks.length === 0) {

    grid.innerHTML = '';

    empty.classList.remove('hidden');

  } else {

    empty.classList.add('hidden');

    const units = state.bookmarks.map(id => UNITS.find(u => u.id === id)).filter(Boolean);

    grid.innerHTML = units.map(u => unitCard(u)).join('');

  }

}

// ============================================================

// RECENTLY VIEWED

// ============================================================

function renderRecent() {

  const grid  = document.getElementById('recent-grid');

  const empty = document.getElementById('recent-empty');

  if (state.recentlyViewed.length === 0) {

    grid.innerHTML = '';

    empty.classList.remove('hidden');

  } else {

    empty.classList.add('hidden');

    const units = state.recentlyViewed.map(id => UNITS.find(u => u.id === id)).filter(Boolean);

    grid.innerHTML = units.map(u => unitCard(u)).join('');

  }

}

// ============================================================

// STATS VIEW

// ============================================================

function renderStats() {

  const total     = UNITS.length;

  const studied   = Object.keys(state.progress).filter(id => state.progress[id].viewed).length;

  const completed = Object.values(state.progress).filter(p => p.completed).length;

  const scores    = Object.values(state.progress).filter(p => p.score != null).map(p => p.score);

  const avg       = scores.length ? Math.round(scores.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0)/scores.length) : 0;

  const streak    = parseInt(localStorage.getItem('eiuStreak') || '0');

  const attempts  = Object.values(state.progress).reduce((sum,p)=>(sum+(p.attempts||0)),0);

  document.getElementById('stats-big-grid').innerHTML = `

    <div class="stats-big-card"><div class="sbc-val">${studied}</div><div class="sbc-label">Units Studied</div><div class="sbc-sub">of ${total} total</div></div>

    <div class="stats-big-card"><div class="sbc-val">${completed}</div><div class="sbc-label">Completed</div><div class="sbc-sub">${Math.round((completed/total)*100)}% of course</div></div>

    <div class="stats-big-card"><div class="sbc-val">${avg ? avg+'%' : '—'}</div><div class="sbc-label">Avg. Score</div><div class="sbc-sub">${attempts} total attempts</div></div>

    <div class="stats-big-card"><div class="sbc-val">${streak}</div><div class="sbc-label">Day Streak 🔥</div><div class="sbc-sub">Keep it up!</div></div>

    <div class="stats-big-card"><div class="sbc-val">${state.bookmarks.length}</div><div class="sbc-label">Bookmarks 🔖</div></div>

    <div class="stats-big-card"><div class="sbc-val">${state.recentlyViewed.length}</div><div class="sbc-label">Topics Visited</div></div>`;

  // Category performance

  const tbody = document.getElementById('perf-tbody');

  tbody.innerHTML = CATEGORIES.map(cat => {

    const catUnits = UNITS.filter(u => u.cat === cat.id);

    const done  = catUnits.filter(u => state.progress[u.id]?.completed).length;

    const catScores = catUnits.filter(u => state.progress[u.id]?.score != null).map(u => state.progress[u.id].score);

    const catAvg = catScores.length ? Math.round(catScores.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0)/catScores.length) : null;

    const pct = Math.round((done/catUnits.length)*100);

    const fillColor = catAvg >= 80 ? 'var(--c-success)' : catAvg >= 50 ? 'var(--c-warn)' : 'var(--c-error)';

    return `<tr>

      <td><span class="tag tag-${cat.color}">${cat.label}</span></td>

      <td>${done}/${catUnits.length}</td>

      <td>${catAvg != null ? catAvg + '%' : '—'}

        ${catAvg != null ? `<span class="perf-mini-bar"><span class="perf-mini-fill" style="width:${catAvg}%;background:${fillColor}"></span></span>` : ''}

      </td>

      <td><div class="prog-bar-bg" style="width:100px;display:inline-block"><div class="prog-bar-fill" style="width:${pct}%"></div></div> ${pct}%</td>

    </tr>`;

  }).join('');

  // Unit results

  const unitTbody = document.getElementById('unit-perf-tbody');

  const unitsDone = UNITS.filter(u => state.progress[u.id]?.score != null);

  unitTbody.innerHTML = unitsDone.map(u => {

    const p = state.progress[u.id];

    const cls = p.score >= 80 ? 'var(--c-success)' : p.score >= 50 ? 'var(--c-warn)' : 'var(--c-error)';

    return `<tr>

      <td>${u.id}</td>

      <td><a href="#" onclick="openUnit(${u.id});return false;" style="color:var(--c-accent)">${u.title}</a></td>

      <td style="color:${cls};font-weight:700">${p.score}%</td>

      <td>${p.attempts || 1}</td>

    </tr>`;

  }).join('');

}

function exportProgress() {

  const data = {

    exportDate: new Date().toISOString(),

    progress: state.progress,

    bookmarks: state.bookmarks,

    recentlyViewed: state.recentlyViewed

  };

  const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(data, null, 2)], {type:'application/json'});

  const url  = URL.createObjectURL(blob);

  const a    = document.createElement('a');

  a.href = url; a.download = 'grammar-progress.json';

  a.click(); URL.revokeObjectURL(url);

  showToast('Progress exported!', 'success');

}

function resetProgress() {

  if (!confirm('Are you sure? This will erase all your progress, scores and bookmarks.')) return;

  state.progress = {}; state.bookmarks = []; state.recentlyViewed = [];

  state.exerciseStates = {};

  localStorage.clear();

  saveState();

  updateSidebarProgress();

  updateBookmarkCount();

  renderHome();

  showToast('Progress reset.', 'info');

}

function markComplete(unitId) {

  if (!state.progress[unitId]) state.progress[unitId] = {};

  state.progress[unitId].completed = !state.progress[unitId].completed;

  saveState();

  updateSidebarProgress();

  renderUnit(UNITS.find(u=>u.id===unitId));

  showToast(state.progress[unitId].completed ? 'Marked as complete!' : 'Marked as incomplete.', 'success');

}

// ============================================================

// EXAM MODE

// ============================================================

function startExam(type) {

  state.examType   = type;

  state.examAnswers = {};

  clearInterval(state.examTimerInterval);

  let pool = [...EXAM_POOL];

  let count = 10;

  if (type === 'standard') count = 25;

  else if (type === 'full')  count = 50;

  else if (type === 'weak') {

    const weakUnits = UNITS

      .filter(u => state.progress[u.id]?.score != null && state.progress[u.id].score < 70)

      .map(u => u.id);

    if (weakUnits.length > 0) {

      pool = pool.filter(q => weakUnits.includes(q.unit));

    }

    count = Math.min(20, pool.length);

  } else if (type.startsWith('cat-')) {

    const catId = type.replace('cat-','');

    const catUnits = UNITS.filter(u => u.cat === catId).map(u => u.id);

    pool = pool.filter(q => catUnits.includes(q.unit));

    count = Math.min(15, pool.length);

  }

  // Shuffle and pick

  for (let i = pool.length - 1; i > 0; i--) {

    const j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1));

    [pool[i], pool[j]] = [pool[j], pool[i]];

  }

  state.examQuestions = pool.slice(0, count);

  document.getElementById('exam-setup').classList.add('hidden');

  document.getElementById('exam-results').classList.add('hidden');

  document.getElementById('exam-active').classList.remove('hidden');

  renderExamQuestions();

  startExamTimer(count * 60); // 1 min per question

  state.examStartTime = Date.now();

}

function renderExamQuestions() {

  const qs = state.examQuestions;

  // Dots

  document.getElementById('exam-dots').innerHTML = qs.map((_,i)=>

    `<div class="ep-dot" id="exam-dot-${i}"></div>`).join('');

  // Questions

  document.getElementById('exam-questions').innerHTML = qs.map((q, i) => `

    <div class="quiz-card">

      <div class="qc-num">Q${i+1} / ${qs.length} — Unit ${q.unit}</div>

      <div class="qc-question">${q.q}</div>

      <div class="qc-options">

        ${q.opts.map((opt, j) => `

          <button class="qc-option" id="exam-opt-${i}-${j}" onclick="selectExamAnswer(${i},${j})">

            ${String.fromCharCode(65+j)}. ${opt}

          </button>`).join('')}

      </div>

    </div>`).join('');

}

function selectExamAnswer(qIdx, optIdx) {

  // Toggle previous selection off

  const q = state.examQuestions[qIdx];

  if (!q) return;

  q.opts.forEach((_, j) => {

    document.getElementById(`exam-opt-${qIdx}-${j}`)?.classList.remove('selected');

  });

  document.getElementById(`exam-opt-${qIdx}-${optIdx}`)?.classList.add('selected');

  state.examAnswers[qIdx] = optIdx;

  // Update dot

  const dot = document.getElementById(`exam-dot-${qIdx}`);

  if (dot) dot.classList.add('answered');

}

function startExamTimer(seconds) {

  let remaining = seconds;

  const timerEl = document.getElementById('exam-timer');

  timerEl.classList.remove('hidden', 'warning');

  const update = () => {

    const m = String(Math.floor(remaining/60)).padStart(2,'0');

    const s = String(remaining % 60).padStart(2,'0');

    timerEl.textContent = `${m}:${s}`;

    if (remaining <= 60) timerEl.classList.add('warning');

    if (remaining <= 0)  { clearInterval(state.examTimerInterval); submitExam(); }

    remaining--;

  };

  update();

  state.examTimerInterval = setInterval(update, 1000);

}

function submitExam() {

  clearInterval(state.examTimerInterval);

  document.getElementById('exam-timer').classList.add('hidden');

  const qs       = state.examQuestions;

  let correct    = 0;

  const results  = [];

  const timeTaken = Math.round((Date.now() - state.examStartTime) / 1000);

  qs.forEach((q, i) => {

    const userAns = state.examAnswers[i];

    const isCorrect = userAns === q.ans;

    if (isCorrect) correct++;

    results.push({ q, userAns, isCorrect });

  });

  const score = Math.round((correct / qs.length) * 100);

  const cls   = score >= 80 ? 'good' : score >= 50 ? 'ok' : 'poor';

  const mins  = Math.floor(timeTaken / 60);

  const secs  = timeTaken % 60;

  document.getElementById('exam-active').classList.add('hidden');

  const res = document.getElementById('exam-results');

  res.classList.remove('hidden');

  // Update dots

  results.forEach((r, i) => {

    const dot = document.getElementById(`exam-dot-${i}`);

    if (dot) {

      dot.classList.remove('answered');

      dot.classList.add(r.isCorrect ? 'correct' : 'wrong');

    }

  });

  res.innerHTML = `

    <div class="score-display" style="margin-bottom:24px">

      <div class="sd-number ${cls}">${score}%</div>

      <div class="sd-label">${correct}/${qs.length} correct · ${mins}m ${secs}s</div>

      <div class="sd-bar"><div class="prog-bar-bg"><div class="prog-bar-fill" style="width:${score}%"></div></div></div>

      <div style="margin-top:16px;display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap">

        <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" onclick="startExam('${state.examType}')">Retry</button>

        <button class="btn btn-outline btn-sm" onclick="endExam()">Back to Exam Menu</button>

      </div>

    </div>

    <div class="section-heading">Detailed Results</div>

    ${results.map((r, i) => `

      <div class="quiz-card" style="border-color:${r.isCorrect?'var(--c-success)':'var(--c-error)'}">

        <div class="qc-num">Q${i+1} — Unit ${r.q.unit} · ${r.isCorrect?'✓ Correct':'✗ Wrong'}</div>

        <div class="qc-question">${r.q.q}</div>

        <div style="font-size:.85rem;padding:6px 0">

          ${r.userAns != null ? `Your answer: <strong style="color:${r.isCorrect?'var(--c-success)':'var(--c-error)'}">${r.q.opts[r.userAns]}</strong>` : '<strong style="color:var(--c-error)">Not answered</strong>'}

          ${!r.isCorrect ? ` · Correct: <strong style="color:var(--c-success)">${r.q.opts[r.q.ans]}</strong>` : ''}

        </div>

        <div class="qc-feedback show ${r.isCorrect?'correct':'wrong'}">${r.q.exp}</div>

        <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" style="margin-top:8px" onclick="openUnit(${r.q.unit})">

          📖 Study Unit ${r.q.unit}

        </button>

      </div>`).join('')}`;

  showToast(`Exam done! Score: ${score}%`, score >= 80 ? 'success' : 'info');

}

function endExam() {

  clearInterval(state.examTimerInterval);

  document.getElementById('exam-active').classList.add('hidden');

  document.getElementById('exam-results').classList.add('hidden');

  document.getElementById('exam-setup').classList.remove('hidden');

  document.getElementById('exam-timer').classList.add('hidden');

  buildExamCatGrid();

}

function buildExamCatGrid() {

  const grid = document.getElementById('exam-cat-grid');

  if (!grid) return;

  grid.innerHTML = CATEGORIES.map(cat => `

    <div class="unit-card" onclick="startExam('cat-${cat.id}')">

      <div class="uc-num tag tag-${cat.color}">${cat.label}</div>

      <div class="uc-title">${cat.label} Test</div>

      <div class="uc-cat">${UNITS.filter(u=>u.cat===cat.id).length} units covered</div>

    </div>`).join('');

}

// ============================================================

// SEARCH

// ============================================================

function initSearch() {

  const input   = document.getElementById('search-input');

  const results = document.getElementById('search-results');

  input.addEventListener('input', () => {

    const q = input.value.trim().toLowerCase();

    if (q.length < 2) { results.classList.remove('open'); return; }

    const hits = UNITS.filter(u =>

      u.title.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||

      (u.subtitle||'').toLowerCase().includes(q) ||

      (u.rules||[]).some(r => r.toLowerCase().includes(q)) ||

      CATEGORIES.find(c=>c.id===u.cat)?.label.toLowerCase().includes(q)

    ).slice(0, 12);

    if (hits.length === 0) {

      results.innerHTML = `<div class="search-item"><div class="si-title" style="color:var(--c-text3)">No results found</div></div>`;

    } else {

      results.innerHTML = hits.map(u => `

        <div class="search-item" onclick="openUnit(${u.id});document.getElementById('search-input').value='';document.getElementById('search-results').classList.remove('open')">

          <span class="si-num">Unit ${u.id}</span>

          <div>

            <div class="si-title">${highlight(u.title, q)}</div>

            <div class="si-cat">${CATEGORIES.find(c=>c.id===u.cat)?.label||''}</div>

          </div>

        </div>`).join('');

    }

    results.classList.add('open');

  });

  document.addEventListener('click', e => {

    if (!e.target.closest('#search-wrap')) results.classList.remove('open');

  });

  input.addEventListener('keydown', e => {

    if (e.key === 'Escape') { results.classList.remove('open'); input.blur(); }

  });

}

function highlight(text, q) {

  if (!q) return text;

  const rx = new RegExp(`(${q.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g,'\\$&')})`, 'gi');

  return text.replace(rx, '<mark style="background:var(--c-accent-light);color:var(--c-accent);padding:0 2px;border-radius:2px">$1</mark>');

}

// ============================================================

// COLLAPSIBLE

// ============================================================

function toggleColl(hdr) {

  const body = hdr.nextElementSibling;

  hdr.classList.toggle('open');

  body.classList.toggle('open');

}

// ============================================================

// READING PROGRESS BAR

// ============================================================

function updateReadingProgress() {

  const panel = state.currentView === 'unit'

    ? document.querySelector('.lesson-panel')

    : document.getElementById(`view-${state.currentView}`);

  if (!panel) return;

  const bar = document.getElementById('reading-progress-bar');

  if (!bar) return;

  const scroll = panel.scrollTop;

  const total  = panel.scrollHeight - panel.clientHeight;

  bar.style.width = total > 0 ? Math.min(100, (scroll / total) * 100) + '%' : '0%';

}

// ============================================================

// TOAST NOTIFICATIONS

// ============================================================

function showToast(msg, type = 'info') {

  const area = document.getElementById('toast-area');

  const icons = { success:'✅', error:'❌', info:'ℹ️' };

  const el = document.createElement('div');

  el.className = `toast ${type}`;

  el.innerHTML = `<span class="toast-icon">${icons[type]||'ℹ️'}</span><span class="toast-msg">${msg}</span>`;

  area.appendChild(el);

  setTimeout(() => el.remove(), 3500);

}

// ============================================================

// MODAL

// ============================================================

function showModal(bodyHtml) {

  document.getElementById('modal-body').innerHTML = bodyHtml;

  document.getElementById('modal-backdrop').classList.add('open');

}

function closeModal() {

  document.getElementById('modal-backdrop').classList.remove('open');

}

function showShortcuts() {

  document.getElementById('shortcuts-modal').classList.add('open');

}

// ============================================================

// PRINT

// ============================================================

function printUnit() {

  window.print();

}

// ============================================================

// QUICK QUIZ (for units without exercises)

// ============================================================

function openQuickQuiz(unitId) {

  const poolForUnit = EXAM_POOL.filter(q => q.unit === unitId);

  if (poolForUnit.length === 0) {

    showToast('No quiz available for this unit yet.', 'info');

    return;

  }

  const qs = poolForUnit.slice(0, 5);

  let html = `<h3>Quick Quiz — Unit ${unitId}</h3>`;

  qs.forEach((q, i) => {

    html += `<div style="margin:16px 0">

      <div class="qc-num">Q${i+1}</div>

      <div class="qc-question">${q.q}</div>

      <div class="qc-options">

        ${q.opts.map((opt, j) => `<button class="qc-option" onclick="this.parentElement.querySelectorAll('.qc-option').forEach(b=>{b.disabled=true;b.classList.remove('selected')});this.classList.add(${j===q.ans}?'correct':'wrong');this.parentElement.querySelectorAll('.qc-option')[${q.ans}].classList.add('correct')">${opt}</button>`).join('')}

      </div>

    </div>`;

  });

  showModal(html);

}

// ============================================================

// KEYBOARD SHORTCUTS

// ============================================================

function initKeyboard() {

  document.addEventListener('keydown', e => {

    const tag = document.activeElement.tagName;

    if (tag === 'INPUT' || tag === 'TEXTAREA') return;

    switch(e.key) {

      case '/': e.preventDefault(); document.getElementById('search-input').focus(); break;

      case 'Escape': closeModal(); document.getElementById('shortcuts-modal').classList.remove('open'); if (state.currentView !== 'home') showView('home'); break;

      case 'ArrowRight': if (state.currentView==='unit') { const idx=UNITS.findIndex(u=>u.id===state.currentUnit); if (UNITS[idx+1]) openUnit(UNITS[idx+1].id); } break;

      case 'ArrowLeft':  if (state.currentView==='unit') { const idx=UNITS.findIndex(u=>u.id===state.currentUnit); if (UNITS[idx-1]) openUnit(UNITS[idx-1].id); } break;

      case 'd': case 'D': toggleTheme(); break;

      case 'b': case 'B': if (state.currentView==='unit' && state.currentUnit) toggleBookmark(state.currentUnit); else showView('bookmarks'); break;

      case 'e': case 'E': showView('exam'); break;

      case 'h': case 'H': showView('home'); break;

      case 's': case 'S': showView('stats'); break;

      case 'r': case 'R': showView('recent'); break;

      case 'p': case 'P': if (state.currentView==='unit') printUnit(); break;

      case '?': showShortcuts(); break;

    }

  });

}

// ============================================================

// SCROLL LISTENER

// ============================================================

function initScrollListener() {

  // Lesson panel scroll

  document.addEventListener('scroll', updateReadingProgress, true);

}

// ============================================================

// SIDEBAR UNIT LIST HEIGHT INIT

// ============================================================

function initSidebarHeights() {

  document.querySelectorAll('.sb-unit-list').forEach(list => {

    list.style.maxHeight = list.scrollHeight + 'px';

  });

}

// ============================================================

// INIT

// ============================================================

window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {

  loadState();

  applyTheme();

  buildSidebar();

  initSearch();

  initKeyboard();

  initScrollListener();

  buildExamCatGrid();

  renderHome();

  showView('home');

  // Init sidebar list heights after DOM built

  setTimeout(initSidebarHeights, 100);

  // Mobile: close sidebar when clicking outside

  document.getElementById('main').addEventListener('click', () => {

    if (window.innerWidth <= 900 && sidebarOpen) toggleSidebar();

  });

});

</script>

</body>

</html>
